summary: CELEBRATE → CAKE flow testing complete. All 18 pytest tests passed (100%). Key features verified: CELEBRATE pillar detection, os_context.celebrate_context with allergies, os_context.celebrate_picks with 4 cake options (Birthday Cake, Savoury, Pumpkin, Mini), no permission loops, no 'Indies have adaptable digestion' claims, chicken allergy respected, birthday detection in temporal_context (Mojo's birthday Feb 14 - 2 days away), concierge_handoff available for CELEBRATE pillar.

celebrate_pillar_detection.party_query: PASS - 'Help me throw a pawty for Mojo' routes to pillar='celebrate'
celebrate_pillar_detection.cake_query: PASS - 'I need a birthday cake for my dog' routes to pillar='celebrate'

celebrate_picks_generation.picks_present: PASS - celebrate_picks array contains cake options

celebrate_picks_generation.concierge_always_flag: PASS - All cake picks have concierge_always:true

no_permission_loop.suggest_cake_options: PASS - 'Suggest cake options' generates celebrate_picks immediately without asking permission again
no_permission_loop.show_cake_options: PASS - 'Show me cake options' generates celebrate_picks immediately

no_indie_digestion_claims.birthday_cake_response: PASS - Response does NOT contain 'Indies have adaptable digestion' or similar forbidden phrases

chicken_allergy_respected.savoury_cake_note: PASS - Savoury cake pick 'why' mentions 'chicken-free version available'
chicken_allergy_respected.llm_response: PASS - LLM response explicitly states 'avoid chicken completely' and lists 'chicken-free' options

outcome_language.concierge_confirmation: PASS - Uses 'Request Created ✓' and 'I'm arranging this for {pet_name} now' instead of 'sent to Concierge'

os_context_verified_fields.layer_activation: VERIFIED - returns pillar name ('celebrate' for birthday/party/cake queries)
os_context_verified_fields.celebrate_context: VERIFIED - returns {pet_name, allergies, diet_restrictions, birthday, temperament, preferences}
os_context_verified_fields.celebrate_picks: VERIFIED - returns 4 cake options with title, why, cta, service_type, concierge_always:true
os_context_verified_fields.concierge_handoff: VERIFIED - returns {available: true, reason: 'Celebration arrangements require coordination', cta: 'Connect to Concierge'}
os_context_verified_fields.temporal_context: VERIFIED - returns {type: 'birthday_upcoming', days_until: 2, date: 'February 14', message: 'Birthday in 2 days!'}
os_context_verified_fields.picks_update: VERIFIED - returns {should_refresh: true, pillar: 'celebrate', context: 'celebration', secondary_pillars: ['dine', 'services']}
